title: Space
questions: What is the difference between 'astrology' and 'astronomy'?
Are you interested in astrology, the signs of the zodiac, etc? What star sign are you? Do you read your horoscope regularly? Why/not?
Would you like to be an astronomer? Why/not?
What do you think we can learn from space exploration?
Do you think that we should invest large sums of money in the exploration of other planets while some people on this planet are living and dying in poverty?
Would you like to travel into space, if it was possible? Where would you go and why?
Do you believe that aliens/UFOs have ever visited our planet?
Have you ever seen a shooting star, a comet or an eclipse of the moon or sun?
How would our lives be different if we still believed that the Earth was at the centre of the universe?
Do you think schoolchildren should learn about the universe we live in? Why/not?
